case_title: C.C.S.F., A MUNICIPAL CORP.,DEPT.OF HUMAN SERVICES VS PITTS, SHIRLEY M.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PITTS, SHIRLEY M.
